first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations, and the core reasoning for the low score (a mismatch in technical skills) remains unchanged. The qualitative descriptions of strengths and concerns are substantively the same, with minor variations in wording that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run noise. The model did not penalize the candidate for having experience in Kenya; it consistently focused on the skills mismatch.
